title: Computer and Information Research Scientists
description: Conduct research into fundamental computer and information science as theorists, designers, or inventors. Develop solutions to problems in the field of computer hardware and software.

tasks.text: Analyze problems to develop solutions involving computer hardware and software.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Apply theoretical expertise and innovation to create or apply new technology, such as adapting principles for applying computers to new uses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assign or schedule tasks to meet work priorities and goals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Meet with managers, vendors, and others to solicit cooperation and resolve problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design computers and the software that runs them.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct logical analyses of business, scientific, engineering, and other technical problems, formulating mathematical models of problems for solution by computers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Evaluate project plans and proposals to assess feasibility issues.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in multidisciplinary projects in areas such as virtual reality, human-computer interaction, or robotics.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Consult with users, management, vendors, and technicians to determine computing needs and system requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop and interpret organizational goals, policies, and procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop performance standards, and evaluate work in light of established standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain network hardware and software, direct network security measures, and monitor networks to ensure availability to system users.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct daily operations of departments, coordinating project activities with other departments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in staffing decisions and direct training of subordinates.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Approve, prepare, monitor, and adjust operational budgets.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
